hero_lead: Capabilities, behaviors, and verification contracts for the subject system.
story_at_a_glance: Each branch groups related capabilities with defined behavior, verification criteria, and failure handling.
story_sub: Design with clarity — behavior, evidence, and edge cases documented for every capability.
explore_branches_sub: Each branch owns a coherent slice of the architecture — select one to read its capabilities.
glossary_intro: Definitions for specialized terms, acronyms, and metrics used in this architecture.
